title: Small Dish Drying Rack, Aufworld Compact Dish Rack with Silicone Drying Mat, Stainless Steel Dish Drainer with Utensil Holder, Space Saving Drain Rack for Kitchen Counter, RVs, Apartments
features: Compact Design: Our small dish drying rack saves counter space while holding plenty of dishes. Measuring 16.5"L x 6.7"W x 6"H, it fits perfectly beside sinks, in/under cabinets, or in drawers. Ideal for small kitchens, apartments, campers, RVs, and more.

Versatile Dish Drainer: This space-saving dish rack fits easily on small counters and holds up to 12 plates, lids, cups, bowls, or cutting boards. It includes a removable 3-slot cutlery holder with drainage holes to keep utensils dry, separated, and organized.

Silicone Drying Mat：Our drip tray effectively catches excess water, keeping your countertop clean and dry. Features BPA-free, food-safe material, this silicone organizer tray doubles as extra drying room or a versatile mat (for sinks, fridges, heat, cups, pet bowls, or plants).

Convenient Sink Dish Drainer: Our utensil holder come with drainage holes and three compartments, the detachable holder keeps forks, spoons, and chopsticks sorted and ventilated for quick drying. Easy to remove for cleaning or repositioning as needed.

Ideal for Small Kitchen: Aufworld dish drying rack for kitchen counter with black coating is built to last. Perfectly sized for single-person kitchens, it sets up easily without tools, no bulky sink setup needed. Its simple, functional design keeps all your dishes organized and drying efficiently.
